ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISCHANGED( Insurance_Provided_By__c ) ,OR( AND( Facility_Title__r.Name <> "External Locums" , OR( ISPICKVAL( Insurance_Provided_By__c , "SCP Insured Locums") ,ISPICKVAL( Insurance_Provided_By__c , "Locum Company"))) , AND(Facility_Title__r.Name = "External Locums", OR( ISPICKVAL( Insurance_Provided_By__c , "SCP") ,ISPICKVAL( Insurance_Provided_By__c , "Commercial"),ISPICKVAL( Insurance_Provided_By__c , "Hospital")))) , NOT( ISBLANK( Facility_Title__c ) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: The selected value is invalid for this clinician’s HPF
